texto: ...if we were to associate the genius of a place with one particular thing – the Russians with literature, say, or the Germans with music, the Dutch and Spanish with painting – we would have to say that the true genius of Ancient India was language.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Aatish Taseer sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “...if we were to associate the genius of a place with one particular thing – the Russians with li…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, india, language, útil em momentos de language e sanskrit.
